scripts.build: bun run clean:generated && bun run db:generate && bun run with-env tsup
scripts.watch: bun run db:generate && bun run with-env tsup --watch
scripts.db:push: bun run with-env prisma db push
scripts.db:push:preview: bun run with-env:preview prisma db push
scripts.db:push:prod: bun run with-env:prod prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate:status: bun run with-env prisma migrate status
scripts.db:migrate:dev: bun run with-env prisma migrate dev --schema ./prisma
scripts.db:migrate:preview: bun run with-env:preview prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:prod: bun run with-env:prod prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:reset: bun run with-env prisma migrate reset
scripts.db:pull: bun run with-env prisma db pull
scripts.db:seed: bun run db:pull && bun run with-env bun ./scripts/seed.ts
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules .turbo dist generated/ tsconfig.tsbuildinfo tsup.config.bundled*
